prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns, ICE (Intercontinental Exchange) as a financial services company tends to have moderate volatility around 15-20% annually. For a 6-day forecast, I estimated daily volatility of approximately 1.2% and applied normal distribution assumptions. The slight upward bias in the point estimate reflects the general long-term upward trend of established financial exchanges, while the confidence intervals account for typical short-term price fluctuations.
